name: Burcelik Bursa Celik Dokum Sanayii A.S.
summary: Bur√É¬ßelik Bursa √É¬áelik D√É¬∂k√É¬ºm Sanayii A.S. manufactures and sells heavy machinery, steel castings, and industrial valves in Turkey. It offers machinery factory products, including track-mounted mobile crushers, impact and cone crushers, stationary and semi-mobile stone crushing machineries, jaw crushers, hammer crushers, sand machines, vertical shaft impactors, feeders, and vibrating screens for crushing-screening-washing plants in the aggregate and mining sectors. The company also provides diversified products, such as ship loading systems for ports, extrusion presses for Al and Cu base alloys, ball mills, and material handling systems; and factory products, such as butterfly and ball valves for pneumatic, electrical actuators, and automation applications. In addition, it offers foundry products comprising kiln rolls and rings, mill trunnions, liners, kiln and mill split gears, pinions, and other wear parts for cement industry; slag pots, blast furnace bells and rings, coiler drums, and chock blocks for iron and steel industry; marine engine parts and stern tube bosses for shipyards; and die holders for automotive industry. Further, the company manufactures ship decks, crane jibs, and adapters; finished crawling crusher units; fine/rough machined components and assemblies for cone, impact, and jaw crushers; jaw stocks, and jaw and cone crusher bodies; and hydro-mechanical parts. It also exports its products to West Europe, Balkan countries, North Africa, the Middle East, and internationally. It products are used in valve, maritime, energy, cement, iron and steel, mineral and crushers, automotive, and general machinery industries. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Bursa, Turkey. Bur√É¬ßelik Bursa √É¬áelik D√É¬∂k√É¬ºm Sanayii A.S. is a subsidiary of Komurcuoglu Insaat Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
